name: Orange Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine the rice, water, orange juice, reduced calorie margarine, and salt.
2. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the orange rind.
4. Turn the bowl about one-quarter turn.
5. Microwave on HIGH for an additional 10 minutes, turning the bowl after 5 minutes. Do not uncover the bowl.
6. Allow to set, covered, for an additional 10 minutes, or until all the liquids have been absorbed.
7. Immediately before serving, fluff with a fork, add orange sections, and mix gently.
NOTE: Makes about 6 (100 calorie) servings.
